reference: Hi, maybe it's just that my husband and I are excited to have a baby, which is why even though my period is not due, I have this feeling that I am pregnant. Some people say that I might be pregnant because I have gained so much weight and my body looks like I am pregnant. I also feel something beating in my lower abdomen, but I don't see any signs of pregnancy. I took a pregnancy test, but it was negative. Could I be pregnant? My last period was on April five. Could I be pregnant?
text: Hi, maybe it's just that my husband and I are excited to have a baby, which is why even though my period is not due, I have this feeling that I am pregnant. Some people say that I might be pregnant because I have gained so much weight, and my body looks like I am pregnant. I also feel some bleeding in the lower abdomen, but I don't see any signs of pregnancy. I took a pregnancy test, but it was negative. Can I be pregnant? My last period was on April 9. Can I be pregnant?
